svg.title: ContextCore architecture overview
svg.desc: Four-layer structural diagram: Client layer, Agent layer, RAG core, and Data layer, with data flow arrows between them.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the REST API gateway work in ContextCore?')
sendPrompt('How does the web UI chat interface work in ContextCore?')
sendPrompt('How do SDK clients connect to ContextCore?')
sendPrompt('How does Slack integration connect to ContextCore?')
sendPrompt('Explain the router agent in ContextCore in detail')
sendPrompt('How does the query planner build multi-hop chains?')
sendPrompt('How does the session memory layer work in ContextCore?')
sendPrompt('How does the answer synthesiser merge partial results?')
g.text: Answer synthesiser — merges partial results, scores confidence, attaches citations

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the chunking and embedding pipeline work?')
sendPrompt('How does the embedder work in the RAG pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does vector retrieval and reranking work?')
sendPrompt('How does the LLM generator produce grounded answers?')
sendPrompt('How does the multi-hop loop work between retriever and planner?')
g.text: Multi-hop loop — retriever result feeds back to planner for next sub-query

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What vector database should I use for ContextCore and why?')
sendPrompt('What goes in the document store in ContextCore?')
sendPrompt('How does session and memory caching work in ContextCore?')
sendPrompt('How does MLflow trace and monitor ContextCore in production?')
